name: old-path-white-clouds
description: Thich Nhat Hanh's 'Old Path White Clouds: Walking in the Footsteps of the Buddha' — a vivid retelling of the Buddha's life from birth to enlightenment, making core Buddhist teachings accessible through storytelling.
useCase: Learn the Buddha's life story, understand core Buddhist teachings, and develop a mindfulness practice rooted in ancient wisdom.
knownRisks: Buddhist perspective — primarily relevant to those interested in Buddhism and mindfulness
Narrative retelling — some scenes are imaginative reconstructions, not historical documents
Lengthy book (14900+ lines) — the skill captures highlights, not every chapter
